description: This email template is a powerful tactic for non-profit organizations, activists, and fundraisers to raise awareness about the importance of clean water and the impacts of climate change and pollution on our environment. Designed with a dark mode aesthetic, it encourages recipients to take meaningful action on World Water Day, a global observance aimed at highlighting the value of this vital resource. The template also draws a connection to Earth Day, underlining the overall importance of environmental preservation. With a clear call-to-action, it's a compelling way to inspire donations and participation in the fight against global warming. It's a perfect choice for those seeking to make a difference in the world.
short_description: Promote clean water and climate change initiatives with our non-profit email template, perfect for Earth Day activism and global celebrations. Its dark mode design is energy-efficient, embodying conservation. Raise awareness on global warming and pollution, celebrating World Water Day by urging action for a healthier planet. Make a difference with this vital environmental campaign tool.

designer.description: My name is Darko Kosanin. I like to turn ideas into something visible. I feel great pleasure when I create something new, using various shapes and combinations of colors, fonts and elements into a new and original design. I am also a web developer, so I turn the design into codes with the same pleasure.

html_data:
Your logo
 
Take action| Donate| Join
 
 

 22nd MARCH 

WORLD WATER DAY

 

World Water Day celebrates water and raises awareness of the 2.2 billion people living without access to safe water.

Save Water
 
 

#take action
 
 
 

The Impact Of Our Action

 
 
 

Relevant issues include water scarcity, water pollution, inadequate water supply, lack of sanitation, and the impacts of climate change.
Read More

 
 
 
 
2.5%
 

only 2.5% water is
fresh, which is
available to drink

 
 
2/3
 

2/3 of the world’s
population could 
face water stress by 
2025.

 
 

4 billion

 

Over 4 billion people
live with severe water
scarcity for at least
one month per year

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

The Impact Of Our Action

 

You can’t wash the waste from your hands when 
it’s all gone. Conserve water and urge others to do the same.

 

What will you do for clean water?
 
DONATE NOW!
 
 
 

 The intention is to inspire people around the world to learn more about water-related issues and to take action to make a difference.

 
Newsletters Magazine Contact
